snippet.title: Game Theory: Minecraft, The Secret Desert Origin of Creepers
snippet.description:
Special thanks to Raycon for sponsoring this video!
Get 15% off your order! ► https://buyraycon.com/matpat

DON'T FORGET to get your brand new Theory Wear! 
Find it all HERE!! ►► https://bit.ly/3beM0ys

Creepers are arguably the most well known Minecraft monster. Yet, despite all we may THINK we know about them, there are still many mysteries yet to be answered. Today Theorists, I aim to answer the BIGGEST question on Creeper lore. Where do they come from? Well, it is no where you would expect! You will have to watch to find out!

Find the game here ► https://www.minecraft.net/en-us

snippet.title: Brawl Stars: Brawl Talk! - Power League, Trophy Road Brawler, and Seasonal Rewards!
snippet.description:
Download NOW!! ►► https://supr.cl/playbrawl
Be a BRAWLER! Subscribe! ►► https://supr.cl/subscribe

Fast-paced 3v3 multiplayer and battle royale made for mobile! Play with friends or solo across a variety of game modes in under three minutes.

Unlock and upgrade dozens of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers and Gadgets! Collect unique skins to stand out and show off. Battle in a variety of mysterious locations within the Brawliverse!

BATTLE IN MULTIPLE GAME MODES
- Gem Grab (3v3): Team up and out-strategize the opposing team. Collect and hold 10 gems to win, but get fragged and lose your gems.
- Showdown (Solo/Duo): A battle royale style fight for survival. Collect power ups for your Brawler. Grab a friend or play solo - be the last Brawler standing in the rowdiest battle royale yet. Winner take all!
- Brawl Ball (3v3): It's a whole new Brawl game! Show off your soccer/football skills and score two goals before the other team. There are no red cards here.
- Bounty (3v3): Take out opponents to earn stars, but don’t let them pick you off. The squad with the most stars wins the match!
- Heist (3v3): Protect your team’s safe and try to crack open your opponents’. Navigate the map to sneak, blast and blow your way clear to the enemies treasure.
- Special Events: Limited time special PvE and PvP game modes.
- Championship Challenge: Join Brawl Stars' esports scene with in-game qualifiers!

UNLOCK AND UPGRADE BRAWLERS
Collect and upgrade a variety of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers and Gadgets! Level them up and collect unique skins.

BRAWL PASS
Complete quests, open Brawl Boxes, earn Gems, pins and an exclusive Brawl Pass skin! Fresh content every season.

BECOME THE STAR PLAYER
Climb the local and regional leaderboards to prove you’re the greatest Brawler of them all!

CONSTANTLY EVOLVING
Look out for new Brawlers, skins, maps, special events and games modes in the future.

PLEASE NOTE! Brawl Stars is free to download and play, however, some game items can also be purchased for real money. If you don't want to use this feature, please disable in-app purchases in your device's settings. Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 9 years of age to play or download Brawl Stars.

Features:
- Team up for real-time 3v3 battles against players from across the world
- A fast-paced multiplayer battle royale mode made for mobile
- Unlock and collect new, powerful Brawlers - each with a signature attack and Super ability
- New events and game modes daily
- Battle solo or with friends
- Climb to the top of the leaderboards in global and local rankings 
- Join or start your own Club with fellow players to share tips and battle together
- Customize Brawlers with unlockable skins
- Player-designed maps offer challenging new terrain to master

From the makers of Clash of Clans, Clash Royale and Boom Beach!

Support:
Contact us in-game via Settings, Help and Support — or visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/brawl-stars/

Privacy Policy:
http://supercell.com/en/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://supercell.com/en/terms-of-service/

Parent's Guide:
http://supercell.com/en/parents/

snippet.title: Bruno Mars, Anderson .Paak, Silk Sonic - Leave the Door Open [Official Video]
snippet.description:
The official music video for Bruno Mars, Anderson .Paak, Silk Sonic's new single "Leave the Door Open"
Download/Stream: https://SilkSonic.lnk.to/LTDOID

Directed by Bruno Mars and Florent Dechard

snippet.title: Clash-A-Rama! Clash Royale 5th Anniversary Awards!
snippet.description:
#clasharama #clashroyale #birthday

The Clash Royale Arena has been turned into a glamorous award show to celebrate the 5th Anniversary!
Who will be Crowned the best Team? Red or Blue…

Thank you to all of our players for the journey so far!
See you in the Arena!

Subscribe for more! ►► http://supr.cl/SubRoyale

Enter the Arena! From the creators of Clash of Clans comes a real-time multiplayer game starring the Royales, your favorite Clash characters and much, much more.

Collect and upgrade dozens of cards featuring the Clash of Clans troops, spells and defenses you know and love, as well as the Royales: Princes, Knights, Baby Dragons and more. Knock the enemy King and Princesses from their towers to defeat your opponents and win Trophies, Crowns and glory in the Arena. Form a Clan to share cards and build your very own battle community.

FEATURES
• Duel players from around the world in real-time in both 1v1 and 2v2 Battles
• Earn chests to unlock rewards, collect powerful new cards and upgrade existing ones
• Destroy opponent's towers and win Crowns to earn epic Crown chests
• Build and upgrade your card collection with the Clash Royale Family along with dozens of your favorite Clash troops, spells and defenses
• Construct your ultimate Battle Deck to defeat your opponents
• Progress through multiple Arenas all the way to the top
• Form a Clan to share cards and build your very own battle community
• Challenge your Clanmates and friends to a private duel, or play side-by-side in a 2v2 Battle
• Work together with your Clan to unlock Clan Chests
• Play new events every week
• Learn different battle tactics by watching the best duels on TV Royale

PLEASE NOTE! Clash Royale is free to download and play, however, some game items can also be purchased for real money. If you don't want to use this feature, please disable in-app purchases in your device's settings. Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash Royale. A network connection is also required.

Support:
Are you having problems? Visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/clash-royale/ or contact us in-game by going to Settings, Help and support.

Privacy Policy:
http://supercell.com/en/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://supercell.com/en/terms-of-service/

Parent's Guide:
http://supercell.com/en/parents/

#ClashRoyale
SUPERCELL™ and CLASH ROYALE™ are trademarks of Supercell Oy

snippet.title: Juice WRLD ft. Clever & Post Malone - Life's A Mess II (Official Visualizer)
snippet.description:
“Life's A Mess” performed by Juice WRLD ft. Clever & Post Malone. Available now: https://Clever.lnk.to/LifesAMess

"Crazy" Album Preorder. Available now: https://Clever.lnk.to/Crazy

►Connect with Clever:
Merch - https://Clever.lnk.to/Merch​ 
Instagram - https://Clever.lnk.to/Instagram​
Facebook - https://Clever.lnk.to/Facebook​ 
Twitter - https://Clever.lnk.to/Twitter​  
SoundCloud - https://Clever.lnk.to/SoundCloud​ 
Tik Tok - https://Clever.lnk.to/TikTok​ 

►Lyrics
(Juice WRLD) 
Have you ever fallen head over heels for somebody? 
Not just somebody 
No, no 
Have you fallen head over heels for somebody 
That made promises to give you the world? Um 
I really hope they held you down 
I really hope it was no lying 
'Cause my heart breaks, it feels like the world's gone 
But if the love's real, you'd feel your soul roar like a lion 
And you'd finally let bygones be bygones 
Don't throw in the towel, I know it feels like you're the only one trying 
You just gotta learn to live and love on 
I belong with the one put on this Earth for me 
Everybody has their someone, just gotta look and see 
I'm screaming out, "Lord, help me, I've been lonely" 
That's when you accept me, then you set me free 

Uh, sometimes life's a mess 
I get high when I'm upset 
I remember when me and love didn't click 
Searching for somethin' real then I found it 
Uh, sometimes life's a mess 
Yeah, I get high when I'm upset 
I remember when me and love ain't click 
Looking for somethin' real then I found it 

(Clever) 
Have you ever fallen head over heels for somebody that made promises to give you the world? 
There’s one that won’t never leave you cold 
or place nothing above you.. 
that will love a heart that hurts- 
don’t hurt the heart that loves you. 
Sometimes they just want what they can’t have- forbidden fruit. 
But the one that deserves ya love will never pick and choose. 
There was once a hole in my heart- 
that hole was hurting-  
til I took a peak inside- 
lately i’ve been soul searching. 
When I use to cry I turned to medication- 
then I found me something real and forgot all the imitations. 
Just tell me that you’ll never leave. 
And when there’s nothing left to say. 
Tell me that you’ll love me anyway ahhh 

Uh, sometimes life's a mess 
I get high when I'm upset 
I remember when me and love didn't click 
Searching for somethin' real then I found it 
Uh, sometimes life's a mess 
Yeah, I get high when I'm upset 
I remember when me and love ain't click 
Looking for somethin' real then I found it 

(Post Malone) 
Have you ever fallen head over heels for somebody  
that made promises to give you the world?  
And I swear I would never leave you cold 
There ain’t no one above you.  
You were way too high to touch  
I was high enough to pass out.  
When you was so alone I was a stones throw away.  
I remember those lips  
I remember how they taste.  
I been staring at the wall doing nothing all day.  
I remember everything put the bottle to my face- Dom Pe.  
If you gave up on me now I would seriously be so fucked up.  
I’m doing everything I can just to keep myself from throwing up.  
Never gave a fuck what they say bout us.  
Fuck all of you muh fuckers slow me up.  
and fuck everything that ruined us.  
I’m three seconds away from pulling out my gun 

#JuiceWRLD #Clever #PostMalone

snippet.title: Starship | SN10 | High-Altitude Flight Test
snippet.description:
As early as Wednesday, March 3, the SpaceX team will attempt a high-altitude flight test of Starship serial number 10 (SN10) – our third high-altitude suborbital flight test of a Starship prototype from SpaceX’s site in Cameron County, Texas. Similar to the high-altitude flight tests of Starship SN8 and SN9, SN10 will be powered through ascent by three Raptor engines, each shutting down in sequence prior to the vehicle reaching apogee – approximately 10 km in altitude. SN10 will perform a propellant transition to the internal header tanks, which hold landing propellant, before reorienting itself for reentry and a controlled aerodynamic descent.
  
The Starship prototype will descend under active aerodynamic control, accomplished by independent movement of two forward and two aft flaps on the vehicle. All four flaps are actuated by an onboard flight computer to control Starship’s attitude during flight and enable precise landing at the intended location. SN10’s Raptor engines will then reignite as the vehicle attempts a landing flip maneuver immediately before touching down on the landing pad adjacent to the launch mount. 

A controlled aerodynamic descent with body flaps and vertical landing capability, combined with in-space refilling, are critical to landing Starship at destinations across the solar system where prepared surfaces or runways do not exist, and returning to Earth. This capability will enable a fully reusable transportation system designed to carry both crew and cargo on long-duration, interplanetary flights and help humanity return to the Moon, and travel to Mars and beyond.  

Given the dynamic schedule of development testing, stay tuned to our social media channels for updates as we move toward SpaceX’s third high-altitude flight test of Starship!

snippet.title: Texas's power disaster is a warning sign for the US
snippet.description:
America's power grid is not ready.

Subscribe and turn on notifications (🔔 ) so you don't miss any videos: http://goo.gl/0bsAjO

In February, extreme cold and an unusual winter storm left millions of Texans in the dark. Many went without power or water, in subzero temperatures, for nearly five days. It was a disaster; dozens died. But even though that storm hit much of the country, the power outages were mostly limited to Texas. That’s because Texas is on its own electrical grid, separate from the rest of the country, which means it can’t easily get power from other states in an emergency.

But Texas's grid itself is not what failed. Power went out across Texas in the first place because energy sources across the state were unprepared for severe weather. And that didn’t have to happen; Texas had been warned about this exact scenario, and had actually experienced versions of it twice in the last 30 years. But they didn’t prepare.

Now the rest of the US faces the same issue. Climate change is making severe weather disasters more and more frequent. And the American energy system is not ready for it.

Read more about what happened in Texas and about the US electrical grid: https://www.vox.com/22289517/texas-storm-uri-weather-power-outage-snow

And check out more coverage of the Texas power crisis from the Texas Tribune: https://www.texastribune.org/2021/02/22/texas-power-grid-extreme-weather/

Vox.com is a news website that helps you cut through the noise and understand what's really driving the events in the headlines. Check out http://www.vox.com.

Watch our full video catalog: http://goo.gl/IZONyE

snippet.title: Apex Legends Chaos Theory Collection Event Trailer
snippet.description:
Beat the heat in the Chaos Theory Collection Event!  Ring Flares are everywhere in Ring Fury Takeover and Caustic's plotting something in his Town Takeover. Plus collect 24 fearsome items!  http://x.ea.com/67416

Mad Maggie is back to shake things up and this time she has sabotaged the Ring. Ring flares are now showing up across the Apex Games in the new Ring Fury Takeover. But don't fret - you'll drop in with the new Heat Shield in your Survival inventory slot so you can withstand Ring damage and recover with your squad. Become a test subject in a twisted experiment and brave the gas for gold-tier loot in Caustic's Town Takeover. Earn free rewards throughout the event and shop for 24 limited-time event items. Get all 24 event items and receive Bangalore's "Cold Steel" Heirloom. Ready to embrace the chaos?

Apex Legends™ is a free-to-play battle royale game where legendary characters battle for glory, fame, and fortune on the fringes of the Frontier. Play for free now on PlayStation® 4, PlayStation 5, Xbox One, Xbox Series X|S, and PC via Origin and Steam.  Apex Legends is also coming to the Nintendo Switch on March 9, 2021. 

Learn more about Apex Legends Season 8 – Mayhem: http://x.ea.com/67416
 
Check out our YouTube channel: http://x.ea.com/56710.
Follow us on Twitter: https://twitter.com/playapex.
Follow us on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/playapex/.

#ChaosTheory #ApexSeason8 #ApexSeason8 #ApexLegends

zh-Hans.title: 《Apex Legends》混沌理论收集活动预告片
zh-Hans.description:
在混沌理论收集活动中克服高温！在“安全区之怒”争夺战中，到处都是安全区闪焰，而侵蚀正在他的城镇争夺战中密谋着什么，外加收集 24 件骇人的物品！http://x.ea.com/67416

疯玛吉回来了，想要颠覆一切，但她这次破坏了安全区。现在，在全新的“安全区之怒”争夺战中，安全区闪焰会在 Apex Games 各处出现，但是不要焦躁——你在跳伞时，消耗品槽位中就会带着一个隔热板，这样你就可以承受安全区伤害，并救回队友。成为一场扭曲实验的测试对象，并勇敢地在侵蚀的城镇争夺战中抢夺黄金级战利品参与整场活动，赢得免费奖励，并购买 24 个限时活动物品。赢得全部 24 个活动物品，并获得班加罗尔的“冷钢”传家宝。准备好拥抱混沌了吗？

《Apex Legends™》是一款免费大逃杀游戏，传奇角色们在边境边缘为荣誉、名望和财富而战。赶快在 PlayStation® 4、PlayStation 5、Xbox One、Xbox Series X|S 和 PC 端 Origin 以及 Steam 上免费游玩。《Apex Legends》还将于 2021 年 3 月 9 日登陆 Nintendo Switch。

ja.title: エーペックスレジェンズ カオスセオリー コレクションイベント トレーラー
ja.description:
カオスセオリー コレクションイベントで熱波を乗り切れ！リングフューリージャックでは、リングフレアが至るところに出現。さらにコースティックがマップジャックで何やら画策している様子だ。イベントに参戦して、驚愕のアイテムを24種類集めよう！http://x.ea.com/67416

マッドマギーが再び登場し、リングシステムを破壊して戦場に新たな変化をもたらした。リングフューリージャックでは、リングフレアがApexゲーム内の至るところに出現する。だが心配無用だ。君はサバイバルインベントリスロットに最新ヒートシールドを所持して降下することになる。このアイテムを使えばリングダメージを防ぎ、仲間の力で回復することも可能だ。コースティックのマップジャックで君は奇妙な実験の被験者となる。ガスの脅威を物ともせず、ゴールドのアイテムを目指せ。イベント期間中は無料報酬を獲得し、24種の期間限定イベントアイテムも購入しよう。全24種類のイベントアイテムを獲得すれば、バンガロールのスーパーレジェンドアイテム「コールドスチール」が手に入る。さあ、カオスに飛び込む覚悟はいいか？

「エーペックスレジェンズ™」は、伝説の戦士が集結してフロンティアの辺境で富と栄誉と名声を懸けて戦う、基本プレイ無料のバトルロイヤル作品。PlayStation®4、PlayStation®5、Xbox One、Xbox Series X|S、Origin（PC）、Steam（PC）で今すぐ無料プレイ。2021年3月9日には、「エーペックスレジェンズ」がNintendo Switchにやってきます。

fr-FR.title: Apex Legends - Trailer de l’événement de collection Théorie du Chaos
fr-FR.description:
Ça va chauffer pendant l'événement de collection Théorie du Chaos !  Des anneaux radieux surgissent sur toute la carte dans le mode Fureur radiale, tandis que Caustic prépare un sale coup dans son nouvel environnement. Collectez également 24 objets terrifiants !  http://x.ea.com/67416

Mad Maggie revient chambouler les Jeux Apex et, cette fois-ci, elle a décidé de saboter la structure de l'anneau. Découvrez un nouveau mode spécial baptisé Fureur radiale, dans lequel des anneaux radieux apparaissent aux quatre coins de la carte. Pas de panique : vous commencerez la partie avec un bouclier thermique dans l'emplacement de survie de votre inventaire, ce qui vous permettra de résister aux dégâts d'anneau et de combattre en harmonie avec votre escouade. Explorez également un nouvel environnement dédié à Caustic, au sein duquel vous devrez survivre à une expérience extravagante et éviter des gaz mortels pour collecter du butin en or. Gagnez des récompenses gratuites tout au long de l'événement et procurez-vous 24 objets spéciaux à durée limitée. Collectez les 24 objets d'événement afin de remporter le set Héritage ""Acier Froid"" de Bangalore. Plongez au cœur du chaos !

Apex Legends™ est un jeu de tir Battle Royale Free-to-Play où des personnages légendaires combattent ensemble aux confins de la Frontière pour la gloire et la fortune. Jouez gratuitement sur PlayStation®4, PlayStation 5, Xbox One, Xbox Series X|S et PC via Origin et Steam.  Retrouvez également Apex Legends sur Nintendo Switch le 9 mars 2021. 

En savoir plus sur Apex Legends Saison 8 – Chaos : http://x.ea.com/67416

de-DE.title: Apex Legends – Chaostheorie-Sammel-Event-Trailer
de-DE.description:
Trotze der Hitze im Chaostheorie-Sammel-Event!  In Ringraserei-Übernahme sind überall Ringflares, und Caustic plant bei seiner Stadtübernahme irgendetwas. Außerdem kannst du dir 24 furchterregende Objekte sichern!  http://x.ea.com/67416

Mad Maggie ist zurück, um wieder einmal alles auf den Kopf zu stellen, und dieses Mal hat sie den Ring sabotiert. Ringflares tauchen in der neuen Ringraserei-Übernahme nun überall bei den Apex-Spielen auf. Aber keine Sorge ... du springst mit dem neuen Hitzeschild in deinem Überlebensslot ab, damit du den Ringschaden überleben und dich mit deinem Squad regenerieren kannst. Werde das Testsubjekt eines teuflischen Experiments und trotze dem Gas, um in Caustics Stadtübernahme Gold-Beute zu erhalten. Sichere dir im Laufe des Events Gratis-Belohnungen und kaufe 24 befristete Event-Objekte. Hol dir alle 24 Event-Objekte, um Bangalores Erbstück ""Kalter Stahl"" zu erhalten. Bist du bereit, dich dem Chaos zu stellen?

Apex Legends™ ist ein Free-to-Play-Battle-Royale-Spiel, bei dem legendäre Charaktere am Rande des Grenzlands um Ruhm und Reichtum kämpfen. Spiele Apex Legends jetzt kostenlos auf PlayStation®4, PlayStation 5, Xbox One, Xbox Series X|S und PC über Origin und Steam.  Apex Legends erscheint am 9. März 2021 für Nintendo Switch.

da.title: Apex Legends Chaos Theory Collection-begivenhedstrailer
da.description:
Skru op for varmen i Chaos Theory Collection-begivenheden  Der dukker Ring Flares op overalt i Ring Fury Takeover, og Caustic har store planer i sin byerobring. Find også 24 frygtindgydende genstande!  http://x.ea.com/67416

Mad Maggie er tilbage, og denne gang har hun saboteret ringen. Der dukker Ring Flares op overalt i Apex Games i den nye Ring Fury Takeover. Men frygt ikke! Du ankommer med det nye Heat Shield i din Survival-lagerplads, så du kan modstå ringskade og restituere med dit hold. Bliv forsøgsperson i et forskruet eksperiment, og opnå bytte på guld-niveau i Caustics byerobring. Optjen gratis belønninger gennem hele begivenheden, og køb 24 tidsbegrænsede begivenhedsgenstande. Saml alle 24 begivenhedsgenstande, og få Bangalores ""Cold Steel"" Heirloom. Er du klar til kaos?

pt-PT.title: Trailer do Evento de Coleção Chaos Theory para Apex Legends
pt-PT.description:
Luta contra o calor no Evento de Coleção Chaos Theory!  Há anéis de fogo por todo o lado no Ring Fury Takeover e o Caustic está a planear algo para o seu Town Takeover. E ainda tens 24 itens temíveis para colecionar!  http://x.ea.com/67416

A Mad Maggie voltou e desta vez sabotou o Anel. O novo Ring Fury Takeover dos Apex Games está cheio de anéis de fogo. Mas não te preocupes - vais entrar em jogo com o novo Heat Shield no teu inventário para que possas suportar o dano do Anel e recuperar com o teu esquadrão. Transforma-te numa cobaia nesta experiência perturbadora e obtém saque de ouro no Town Takeover de Caustic. Ganha recompensas gratuitas e compra 24 itens exclusivos do evento. Obtém os 24 itens e recebe a relíquia ""Cold Steel"" para Bangalore. Vais deixar-te envolver pelo caos?

ko.title: Apex 레전드 카오스 이론 수집품 이벤트 트레일러
ko.description:
카오스 이론 수집품 이벤트에서 열기를 이겨내십시오!  링 퓨리 장악전에서 수많은 링 플레어가 발생합니다. 그리고 코스틱이 마을 장악전에서 무언가를 계획하고 있습니다. 또한 공포의 치장 아이템 24개를 획득하십시오!  http://x.ea.com/67416

매드 매기가 게임을 뒤흔들기 위해 이번에는 링을 조작하였습니다. 신규 장악전 링 퓨리에서는 Apex 게임 전역에 링 플레어가 생성됩니다. 하지만 걱정하지 마십시오. 생존 소지품 슬롯에 새로운 아이템 히트 실드와 함께 강하하여 분대와 함께 링 대미지를 견뎌낼 수 있습니다. 코스틱의 마을 장악전에서 골드 티어 전리품을 위해 독성 가스를 견뎌내는 사악한 실험에 참가하십시오. 이벤트 동안 무료 보상을 얻고 24개의 기간 한정 이벤트 아이템을 구매하십시오. 24개의 이벤트 아이템을 모두 모아 방갈로르 ""콜드 스틸"" 영웅 아이템을 획득하십시오. 카오스를 받아들일 준비가 되셨습니까?

Apex 레전드™는 전설적인 캐릭터들이 영광과 명성, 부를 쟁취하기 위해 프런티어의 변경에서 치열한 전투를 벌이는 부분 유료 배틀 로얄 게임입니다. PlayStation® 4, PlayStation 5, Xbox One, Xbox Series X|S, PC Origin 및 Steam에서 무료 플레이하십시오.  또한 2021년 3월 9일 Apex 레전드가 Nintendo Switch에 출시됩니다.

nl-NL.title: Trailer Apex Legends Chaos Theory Collection Event
nl-NL.description:
Versla de hitte op het Chaos Theory Collection Event!  Ring Flares zijn overal in Ring Fury Takeover, en Caustic beraamt plannen in zijn Town Takeover. Verzamel daarnaast 24 angstaanjagende items!  http://x.ea.com/67416

Mad Maggie is terug om chaos te zaaien, en deze keer heeft ze de Ring gesaboteerd. Er verschijnen nu ring flares tijdens de Apex Games in de nieuwe Ring Fury Takeover. Maar maak je geen zorgen: je valt binnen met het nieuwe Heat Shield in het Survival-inventarisslot, zodat je Ringschade kunt weerstaan en kunt herstellen met je squad. Word een proefkonijn in een verwrongen experiment en trotseer het gas voor gold-tier loot in de Caustics Town Takeover. Verdien gratis beloningen tijdens het evenement en koop 24 tijdelijke event items. Ontvang alle 24 event items en ontvang Bangalores ""Cold Steel"" Heirloom. Ben je klaar om de chaos te omarmen?

pt-BR.title: Trailer do Evento de Coleção Teoria do Caos de Apex Legends
pt-BR.description:
Vença o calor do momento no Evento de Coleção Teoria do Caos! Anéis Flamejantes apareceram em todo canto na Tomada de Fúria do Anel, e Caustic planeja alguma coisa na sua própria Tomada de Cidade. Além disso, colete 24 itens incríveis! http://x.ea.com/67416

Mad Maggie voltou para sacudir as coisas, e dessa vez ela sabotou o Anel. Anéis Flamejantes agora aparecem em todos os Jogos Apex na nova Tomada de Fúria do Anel. Mas não se preocupe: você começa com o novo Escudo de Calor no espaço de inventário de sobrevivência, então consegue resistir ao dano do Anel e se recuperar com seu esquadrão. Torne-se cobaia em um experimento doentio e enfrente o gás para obter saques de ouro na Tomada de Cidade do Caustic. Ganhe recompensas grátis ao longo do evento e compre 24 itens únicos limitados ao evento. Obtenha os 24 itens de evento e receba a Herança Bangalore ""Aço Frio"". Tudo pronto para aceitar o caos?

sv.title: Trailer för Apex Legends-samlarevenemanget Chaos Theory
sv.description:
Trotsa hettan i samlarevenemanget Chaos Theory!  Ringeruptioner förekommer överallt i Ring Fury-erövringen och Caustic smider nya planer i sin stadserövring. Dessutom kan du samla 24 grymma föremål!  http://x.ea.com/67416

Mad Maggie är tillbaka och den här gången har hon saboterat ringen. Nu förekommer ringeruptioner över hela Apex Games i den nya Ring Fury-erövringen. Men oroa dig inte – den nya värmeskölden finns i ditt överlevnadsfack redan från början så att du och dina lagmedlemmar kan stå emot ringskada. Bli en försöksperson i ett skruvat experiment och trotsa gasen för att få guldklassade byten i Caustics stadserövring. Få kostnadsfria belöningar under hela evenemanget och håll utkik efter 24 tidsbegränsade evenemangsföremål. Om du samlar alla 24 evenemangsföremål får du Bangalores Heirloom ""Cold Steel"". Är du redo att ge dig in i kaoset?

fi.description:
Valmistaudu myräkkään Chaos Theory Collection -tapahtumassa!  Ring Fury Takeoverissa tulirenkaita on kaikkialla, ja Causticilla on Town Takeoverissa pahat mielessä. Kerää myös 24 pelkoa herättävää esinettä!  http://x.ea.com/67416

Mutta älä pelkää – saat Survival-esinepaikkaasi uuden Heat Shieldin, jonka ansiosta kestät rengasvahinkoa ja voit elvyttää tiimiläisiäsi. it.title: Apex Legends - Evento collezione Teoria del caos - Il trailer
it.description:
La tensione è alle stelle nell'evento collezione Teoria del caos!  Gli anelli radiosi saranno ovunque nella modalità Furia dell'anello, e Caustic sta tramando qualcosa nella sua nuova area. E poi, non dimenticare di collezionare i 24 oggetti cosmetici da urlo!  http://x.ea.com/67416

Mad Maggie è tornata per dare una bella scossa ai giochi, e questa volta ha deciso di sabotare l'anello. Nella nuova modalità Furia dell'anello, gli anelli radiosi saranno in ogni angolo della mappa. Ma niente paura, perché al momento del lancio avrai uno scudo termico equipaggiato. Lo trovi nello slot sopravvivenza nell'inventario! Usalo per bloccare i danni dell'anello e curarti insieme alla tua squadra. Fai da cavia per un nuovo folle esperimento e sfida il gas per accaparrarti il bottino di alto livello nella nuova area di Caustic. Ottieni ricompense gratuite per l'intera durata dell'evento e acquista i 24 oggetti cosmetici limitati. Sbloccali tutti e riceverai il Set cimelio di famiglia ""Freddo acciaio"" di Bangalore. Preparati ad affrontare il caos!

Gioca gratis su PlayStation 4, PlayStation 5, Xbox One, Xbox Series X|S e PC tramite Origin e Steam.  E dal 9 marzo 2021, il gioco sarà anche disponibile su Nintendo Switch.

Apex Legends™ er et gratis battle royale-spill hvor legendariske karakterer kjemper om rikdom og ære ved Frontiers utkant. Spill gratis nå på PlayStation®4, PlayStation 5, Xbox One, Xbox Series X|S, og PC via Origin og Steam.  Apex Legends kommer også til Nintendo Switch 9. mars 2021.

Besøk YouTube-kanalen vår: http://x.ea.com/56710.
Følg oss på Twitter: https://twitter.com/playapex.
Følg oss på Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/playapex/.

#ChaosTheory #ApexSeason8 #ApexSeason8 #ApexLegends

es-MX.title: Tráiler del evento de colección Teoría del caos de Apex Legends
es-MX.description:
¡Vence al calor en el evento de colección Teoría del caos!  En la Invasión de Furia de anillo habrá anillos radiantes por todas partes y Caustic está tramando algo en su toma de la ciudad. ¡Además, recoge 24 artículos temibles!  http://x.ea.com/67416

Maggie la Loca regresa para crear el caos y esta vez saboteó el anillo. En la nueva Invasión de Furia de anillo aparecen anillos radiantes por los Apex Games. Pero no temas, te desplegarás con los nuevos termoescudos en tu espacio del inventario de supervivencia para que puedas soportar el daño del anillo y recuperarte con tu escuadrón. Conviértete en un sujeto de pruebas en un experimento retorcido y sobrevive al gas en la toma de la ciudad de Caustic para obtener botín de nivel dorado.  Gana recompensas gratis por todo el evento y compra 24 artículos del evento por tiempo limitado. Obtén los 24 artículos del evento y recibe la reliquia ""Acero frío"" de Bangalore. ¿Tienes todo listo para aceptar el caos?

Apex Legends™ es un juego gratuito estilo Battle Royale en el que personajes legendarios luchan por la gloria, la fama y la fortuna en los límites de la Frontera. Juega gratis ahora en PlayStation®4, PlayStation®5, Xbox One, Xbox Series X|S y PC a través de Origin y Steam.  Apex Legends también llega a Nintendo Switch el 9 de marzo de 2021. 

Descubre más sobre la temporada 8 de Apex Legends – Estragos: http://x.ea.com/67416
 
Checa nuestro canal de YouTube: http://x.ea.com/56710.
Síguenos en Twitter: https://twitter.com/playapex.
Síguenos en Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/playapex/.

#ChaosTheory #ApexSeason8 #ApexSeason8 #ApexLegends

es-ES.title: Tráiler del evento de colección Teoría del caos de Apex Legends
es-ES.description:
¡Prepárate par ala subida de temperatura en el evento de colección Teoría del caos!  Los anillos radiantes están por todas partes en Invasión de Furia de anillo y Caustic planea algo en su captura de la ciudad. Además, ¡consigue 24 objetos imponentes!  http://x.ea.com/67416

Maggie la Loca ha vuelto para liarla y esta vez ha saboteado el anillo. Los anillos radiantes aparecen en los Juegos Apex en la nueva Invasión de Furia de anillo. Pero no te preocupes: te lanzarás con el nuevo termoescudo en el espacio de inventario de supervivencia para que puedas soportar el daño del anillo y recuperarte con tu pelotón. Conviértete en conejillo de Indias en un retorcido experimento y enfréntate al gas para obtener botines de oro en la Captura de la ciudad de Caustic. Consigue recompensas gratuitas durante el evento y compra 24 objetos del evento por tiempo limitado. Obtén los 24 objetos del evento y recibe la reliquia Acero frío de Bangalore. ¿Tienes ganas de disfrutar del caos?

Apex Legends™ es un juego de Battle Royale gratuito donde personajes legendarios se enfrentan para lograr gloria, fama y fortuna en los confines de la Frontera. Juega gratis ya en PlayStation®4, PlayStation®5, Xbox One, Xbox Series X|S y PC a través de Origin y Steam.  Apex Legends también llegará a Nintendo Switch el 9 de marzo de 2021. 

Obtén más información sobre la temporada 8 de Apex Legends: Estragos en http://x.ea.com/67416

zh-Hant.title: 《Apex 英雄》混沌理論收藏活動預告片
zh-Hant.description:
在混沌理論收藏活動中與熱能對抗！在圓圈怒火侵略中，圓圈火光無所不在，而且腐蝕正在計畫他的小鎮侵略，另外，收集 24 款恐怖的道具！http://x.ea.com/67416

瘋狂瑪吉要回來改變戰場了，這次她破壞了圓圈。在全新的圓圈怒火侵略中，圓圈火光將出現在 Apex 競賽各處，不過別擔心，進入戰場時，你的生存道具欄中將有全新的熱能護盾，這樣你就能夠抵擋圓圈傷害，並救回你的小隊。一起整隊在腐蝕小鎮侵略的扭曲實驗中成為實驗品，並穿越毒氣來取得黃金戰利品。在此活動期間獲得免費獎勵，並購買 24 款活動限定道具，取得全 24 款活動道具，並獲得邦加羅爾「寒鐵」傳家寶。準備好要接受混沌了嗎？

《Apex 英雄》是一款可免費遊玩的大逃殺遊戲，傳說中的角色們將在邊境的遠處為榮耀、名聲與財富而戰。立即在 PlayStation® 4、PlayStation 5、Xbox One、Xbox Series X|S 與 PC 上的 Origin 和 Steam 上免費遊玩。《Apex 英雄》將在 2021 年 3 月 9 日來到 Nintendo Switch。

深入瞭解《Apex 英雄》賽季 8 - 大亂鬥：http://x.ea.com/67416
 
查看我們的 YouTube 頻道：http://x.ea.com/56710
在 Twitter 上追蹤我們：https://twitter.com/playapex
在 Instagram 上追蹤我們：https://www.instagram.com/playapex/

#ChaosTheory #ApexSeason8 #ApexSeason8 #ApexLegends

pl.title: Apex Legends – zwiastun wydarzenia kolekcjonerskiego „Teoria chaosu”
pl.description:
Przetrwaj w ogniu wydarzenia kolekcjonerskiego „Teoria chaosu”  Rozbłyski pierścienia pojawiają się wszędzie podczas przejęcia igrzysk „Furia pierścienia”, a Caustic knuje coś na swoje przejęcie miasta. Zbierz 24 budzące postrach przedmioty!  http://x.ea.com/67416

Szalona Maggie powraca, aby trochę namieszać – tym razem sabotuje pierścień. W nowym przejęciu igrzysk „Furia pierścienia” jego rozbłyski pojawiają się ciągle. Ale bez obaw – na wyposażeniu masz nowy gadżet do przetrwania: osłonę termiczną, która pomoże twojemu oddziałowi przetrwać w ogniu pierścienia. Zostań obiektem badań w szalonym eksperymencie i przetrwaj w oparach gazu, aby zdobyć złoty łup w przejęciu miasta Caustica. Zdobywaj darmowe nagrody przez cały okres trwania wydarzenia i zapoluj w sklepie na 24 ograniczone czasowo przedmioty z wydarzenia. Zdobądź wszystkie 24 przedmioty, aby otrzymać pamiątkę Bangalore „Zimna stal”. Czy masz dość odwagi, aby połączyć się z chaosem?

Apex Legends™ to darmowa gra Battle Royale, w której legendarne postacie mierzą się ze sobą w walce o sławę i chwałę na obrzeżach Kresów. Graj za darmo już teraz na PlayStation® 4, PlayStation 5, Xbox One, Xbox Series X|S oraz Origin i Steam na PC.  9 marca 2021 r. Apex Legends trafi także na Nintendo Switch. 

Dowiedz się więcej o sezonie 8. Apex Legends – Zniszczenie: http://x.ea.com/67416
 
Zajrzyj na nasz kanał w serwisie YouTube: http://x.ea.com/56710.
Śledź nas na Twitterze: https://twitter.com/playapex.
Obserwuj nas na Instagramie: https://www.instagram.com/playapex/.

#ChaosTheory #ApexSeason8 #ApexSeason8 #ApexLegends

ru.title: Apex Legends — трейлер коллекционного события «Теория хаоса»
ru.description:
Пройдите огонь в коллекционном событии «Теория хаоса»!  Кольцевые вспышки появляются тут и там в захвате «Кольцо ярости», а Каустик что-то готовит в своих захваченных землях. И конечно, соберите 24 внушающих страх предмета!  http://x.ea.com/67416

Безумная Мэгги вернулась, чтобы сотрясти Игры, и на этот раз она устроила диверсию в кольце. В новом захвате «Кольцо ярости» кольцевые вспышки будут возникать по всей территории Игр Apex. Но не переживайте: вас высадят с новым тепловым щитом в ячейке выживания, так что вы сможете выдержать урон от кольца и вернуться к отряду. Станьте подопытным в нездоровом эксперименте и пройдите через облако газа, чтобы получить золотую добычу в захваченных землях Каустика. Зарабатывайте бесплатные награды в ходе события и не забудьте приобрести 24 временных предмета события. Получите все 24 предмета события, и тогда вам достанется реликвия Бангалор «Холодная сталь». Готовы упасть в объятья хаоса?

Apex Legends™ — бесплатная игра в жанре «королевская битва», где легендарные персонажи сражаются за славу и богатства на дальних рубежах Фронтира. Играйте бесплатно на PlayStation® 4, PlayStation 5, Xbox One и Xbox Series X|S, а также на ПК через Origin и Steam.  Apex Legends выйдет на Nintendo Switch 9 марта 2021 года. 

Узнайте больше о сезоне 8 Apex Legends «Переполох»: http://x.ea.com/67416
 
Загляните на наш канал на YouTube: http://x.ea.com/56710.
Следите за нашей страницей в Twitter: https://twitter.com/playapex.
Подпишитесь на нашу страницу в Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/playapex/.

#ChaosTheory #ApexSeason8 #ApexSeason8 #ApexLegends

en.title: Apex Legends Chaos Theory Collection Event Trailer
en.description:
Beat the heat in the Chaos Theory Collection Event!  Ring Flares are everywhere in Ring Fury Takeover and Caustic's plotting something in his Town Takeover. Plus collect 24 fearsome items!  http://x.ea.com/67416

Mad Maggie is back to shake things up and this time she has sabotaged the Ring. Ring flares are now showing up across the Apex Games in the new Ring Fury Takeover. But don't fret - you'll drop in with the new Heat Shield in your Survival inventory slot so you can withstand Ring damage and recover with your squad. Become a test subject in a twisted experiment and brave the gas for gold-tier loot in Caustic's Town Takeover. Earn free rewards throughout the event and shop for 24 limited-time event items. Get all 24 event items and receive Bangalore's "Cold Steel" Heirloom. Ready to embrace the chaos?

Apex Legends™ is a free-to-play battle royale game where legendary characters battle for glory, fame, and fortune on the fringes of the Frontier. Play for free now on PlayStation® 4, PlayStation 5, Xbox One, Xbox Series X|S, and PC via Origin and Steam.  Apex Legends is also coming to the Nintendo Switch on March 9, 2021. 

Learn more about Apex Legends Season 8 – Mayhem: http://x.ea.com/67416
 
Check out our YouTube channel: http://x.ea.com/56710.
Follow us on Twitter: https://twitter.com/playapex.
Follow us on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/playapex/.

#ChaosTheory #ApexSeason8 #ApexSeason8 #ApexLegends

snippet.title: (spearfishing big mahi mahi)
snippet.description:
#shorts
THIS IS THE CAMERA I USE: https://amzn.to/2NmvzWZ
MUSIC by these guys: https://soundcloud.com/kromatiks-music

This is the microphone I use: https://amzn.to/2OvYFUE

This is my dive mask (with gopro mount): https://amzn.to/2Omg4Po

These are my carbon fiber dive fins: https://amzn.to/375P39k

Great book about learning how to spearfish: https://amzn.to/3rM9Zu5

Amazing book about freediving, the ocean, and our connection to these things as humans: https://amzn.to/3778MFJ

Interesting read on how it’s scientifically proven that being near, in, on or under water can make you happier, healthier, more connected, and better at what you do: https://amzn.to/3d3USbc

This book is all about big fish, where to find them, and how to spear them. Written by a spearfishing OG, it will inspire you to explore the world, searching for big fish: https://amzn.to/2OxpcRt 

William Trubridge can dive to over 100 meters (330 feet) on a single breath of air, without wearing fins. This well-written autobiography explores his journey to become one of the deepest diving humans in the history of the world, and also helps show the potential that we all have inside of ourselves to dive deep, if we practice: https://amzn.to/3pe8R0P

Finally, this book tells a tragic tale of an extremely talented freediver and how dangerous this sport can be, if not practiced safely: https://amzn.to/3aWqdtZ

***If you want to learn how to freedive or spearfish, DO NOT TRY IT ALONE. I recommend signing up for a freediving course to learn how to dive safely and find a buddy do dive with 🤙🤙******

This well-written autobiography explores his journey to become one of the deepest diving humans in the history of the world, and also helps show the potential that we all have inside of ourselves to dive deep, if we practice: https://amzn.to/3pe8R0P

Finally, this book tells a tragic tale of an extremely talented freediver and how dangerous this sport can be, if not practiced safely: https://amzn.to/3aWqdtZ

***If you want to learn how to freedive or spearfish, DO NOT TRY IT ALONE. I recommend signing up for a freediving course to learn how to dive safely and find a buddy do dive with 🤙🤙******

snippet.title: Without Remorse - Official Trailer | Prime Video
snippet.description:
Tom Clancy's Without Remorse, or simply Without Remorse, is an upcoming American action thriller film starring Michael B. Jordan directed by Stefano Sollima and written by Taylor Sheridan and Will Staples. It is based on the 1993 novel of the same name by Tom Clancy and a spin-off of the Jack Ryan film series.

The film tells the origin story of John Kelly (aka John Clark), a U.S. Navy SEAL, who uncovers an international conspiracy while seeking justice for the murder of his pregnant wife by Russian soldiers. When Kelly joins forces with fellow SEAL Karen Greer and shadowy CIA agent Robert Ritter, the mission unwittingly exposes a covert plot that threatens to engulf the U.S. and Russia in an all-out war.

You got to pay your way in pain
you got to pray your way in shame

I went to the store I was feeling kinda hungry but I didn’t have the money and the shelves were all empty so I went to the bank to check my checking the man looked at my face, said we don’t have a record

Oh no you thought we had forgotten the show is only getting started the road is feeling like a pothole
Sit down stand up
Head down hands up and

Pay your way in pain

You got to
Pray your way in shame

You know what I want?
What do you want?
You know what I want?
What do you want?
I wanna be loved

So I went to the park just to watch the little children
The mothers saw my heels and they said I wasn’t welcome
So I went back home I was feeling kinda queasy but all the locks were changed and my baby wouldn’t see me

Oh no you put your finger on it
The stove is only getting hotter
The sun is gone to melting

Stand up sit down
Hands up breakdown

You know what I want?
What do you want?
You know what I want?
What do you want?
I wanna be loved

snippet.title: Jack Harlow: Tiny Desk (Home) Concert
snippet.description:
The Tiny Desk is working from home for the foreseeable future. Introducing NPR Music's Tiny Desk (home) concerts, bringing you performances from across the country and the world. It's the same spirit — stripped-down sets, an intimate setting — just a different space.

Bobby Carter | March 3, 2021
Jack Harlow's Tiny Desk (home) concert feels like the arrival of a rap superstar. Tucked in a homey-looking space in Los Angeles surrounded by bookshelves and vintage furniture, the Louisville, Ky., emcee delivers a performance with the confidence of an old pro. His set, however, is the first time he's relied solely on live instrumentation to bring his songs to life. "It's been a long time since I had a chance to perform and I've never done it like this," he says.

This is a far stretch from the kid with loose curls and specs frolicing with his hometown friends, but his success should serve as a reminder of the importance of artist development. He's been able to slow cook for a few years, consistently dropping mixtapes and visuals until he landed a big hit last year in "WHATS POPPIN." That performance earned him a Grammy nomination ahead of his very impressive debut album, Thats What They All Say.

For this turn at the Tiny Desk, Harlow, his band and some background singers deliver a megamix of highlights from the album. The orchestration underscores his sentimental and introspective side on songs like "Same Guy" and "Funny Seeing You Here," but it also elevates the melody, which is the true hero here. Over the past few years, the 22-year-old rapper has steadily ticked the boxes for a successful career, and this showing undoubtedly checks the performer section.

SET LIST
"Rendezvous"
"21C / Delta"
"Funny Seeing You Here"
"Same Guy"
"Creme/ONCE MAY COMES"
"Whats Poppin"

MUSICIANS
Jack Harlow: vocals
O'Neil "Doctor O" Palmer: keys
Rico Nichols: drums
Joe Cleveland - bass
Rob Gueringer: guitar
Erik B: vocals
Chimera Patrice: vocals
Porcha Clay: vocals

CREDITS
Video: Ace Pro, Chadrick Fellers / WastedPotential, Donald Turner, Karis West, Kylie Hazzard
Audio: Nickie Jon Pabón, CJ Blair
Playback: Kenny Woods
Backline: Jonathan Castillo

TINY DESK TEAM
Producer: Bobby Carter
Video Producer: Morgan Noelle Smith
Audio Mastering: Josh Rogosin
Tiny Production Team: Bob Boilen, Kara Frame, Maia Stern
Executive Producer: Lauren Onkey
Senior VP, Programming: Anya Grundmann

snippet.title: iKON - ‘왜왜왜 (Why Why Why)’ M/V
snippet.description:
왜왜왜 (Why Why Why)

사람에서 사랑으로
인연에서 연인으로
이별 없이 영원할 줄 알았는데
 
사실 아직도 거짓말 같죠 
활짝 웃으며 올 것만 같죠
아름다웠던 모습 그대로 

이제 와서야 후회만 해요
웃는 게 이쁜 그댈 울리기만 했죠
내가 바란 건 이게 아닌데

결국 이 지경 이 꼴이지 나란 놈
지켜주지도 못했지 너란 꽃
빨갛게 불타오르던 우리 모든 게 
하얗게 재만 남았죠 

사람에서 사랑으로
인연에서 연인으로
아름다운 사랑 꽃을 피웠는데

꽃을 피웠는데

웃음은 왜 울음이 돼
님에서 남이 돼버린 그대
이별 없이 영원할 줄 알았는데
우린 왜 왜 왜

내 꿈속에서도 멀어지는 너
아무것도 난 할 수가 없죠
멈춰보려 소리쳐도
눈을 뜨면 사라지죠
왜 네가 있을 때 잘해야 했던 걸
그때 난 몰랐을까
왜 모든 것들을 잃고 난 후에
소중함을 알게 될까

결국 이 지경 이 꼴이지 나란 놈
지켜주지도 못했지 너란 꽃
빨갛게 불타오르던 우리 모든 게
하얗게 재만 남았죠

사람에서 사랑으로
인연에서 연인으로
아름다운 사랑 꽃을 피웠는데

꽃을 피웠는데

웃음은 왜 울음이 돼
님에서 남이 돼버린 그대
이별 없이 영원할 줄 알았는데
우린 왜 왜 왜

그때 마지막인 줄 알았다면 조금 더
네 모습을 담아뒀을 텐데

단 한 번도 사랑하지 않은 적 없죠
처음부터 지금까지도

snippet.title: Brad Makes Fermented Salsa | It's Alive | Bon Appétit
snippet.description:
It's Alive with Brad Leone is back for episode 78 and this time Brad is making fermented salsa. Join Brad as chars up some chilis and lets 'em ferment to make a salsa so nice you just might dip twice.
Follow Brad on Instagram: @brad_leone

Join Bon Appétit test kitchen guy, Brad Leone, on a wild, roundabout and marginally scientific adventure exploring fermented foods and more. From cultured butter and kombucha, to kimchi and miso, to beer and tepache, learn how to make fermented and live foods yourself.

Want Bon Appétit shirts, hats and more? https://shop.bonappetit.com/?utm_source=youtube&utm_brand=ba&utm_campaign=aud-dev&utm_medium=video&utm_content=merch-shop-promo

Still haven’t subscribed to Bon Appétit on YouTube? ►► http://bit.ly/1TLeyPn

Want more Bon Appétit in your life? Subscribe to the magazine! https://bit.ly/313UWRu

ABOUT BON APPÉTIT
Bon Appétit is a highly opinionated food brand that wants everyone to love cooking and eating as much as we do. We believe in seasonal produce, properly salted pasta water, and developing recipes that anyone can make at home. 


Brad Makes Fermented Salsa | It's Alive | Bon Appétit

Want Bon Appétit shirts, hats and more? https://shop.bonappetit.com/?utm_source=youtube&utm_brand=ba&utm_campaign=aud-dev&utm_medium=video&utm_content=merch-shop-promo

Still haven’t subscribed to Bon Appétit on YouTube? ►► http://bit.ly/1TLeyPn

Want more Bon Appétit in your life? Subscribe to the magazine! https://bit.ly/313UWRu

ABOUT BON APPÉTIT
Bon Appétit is a highly opinionated food brand that wants everyone to love cooking and eating as much as we do. We believe in seasonal produce, properly salted pasta water, and developing recipes that anyone can make at home. 


Brad Makes Fermented Salsa | It's Alive | Bon Appétit

snippet.title: Never Have I Ever Challenge to reveal TRUTH!- Rebecca Maddie Challenges
snippet.description:
After eating only one color food for 24 hours in this challenge it is time to spill some tea. Rebecca and Maddie are doing the never have I ever fondue challenge.  We find out if Maddie has a crush and do they have any crazy secrets.  Even though they are best friends and look like twins no one knows everything you do in 24 hours. Do you think someone will get scared and quit? Also, who will win and can they get along without fighting even if they aren't playing for $10,000?

Paroles : 

Iiiiih
Iiiihhhh
Oohohoh
Menedo x7
Mami ouh mami x7

Refrain :
Oh le temps, le temps m’a réparé
Plus rien n’est comme avant 
Quelqu’un m’a déjà soigné
Ooh le vent, le vent a bien tourné
Ne gaspille pas mon temps
Une autre a su me soigner  

Toi la tu disparais sans laisser un mot 
T’as préféré fuir comme un enfant, partir sans te retourner
J’tai prêté mon coeur et tu lui as donné ton dos 
Toi tu m’as fais gaspiller mon temps, 
Tu n’ma pas laisser parler
Aahhhiiiii
Et maintenant, tu reviens, et comme avant, 
tu espère retrouver celui qui t’as aimé, celui avec qui t’as joué
Et maintenant, maintenant c’est toi qui veut parler
Et toute tes meilleures phrases tu veux les caler
Ne gaspille pas mon temps 

Refrain :
Oh le temps, le temps m’a réparé
Plus rien n’est comme avant 
Quelqu’un m’a déjà soigné
Ooh le vent, le vent a bien tourné
Ne gaspille pas mon temps
Une autre a su me soigner  

Ne me fais pas croire que j’nai pas fais c’quil faut
Moi je t’ai fais passer avant tout
J’en ai perdu la raison
Sans aucun remords toi t’as tout jeté à l’eau
J’étais devenu accro à ton goût
Le goût de ton poison.
Mais maintenant, moi ça va, avec toi
J’avais comme l’impression de devoir supplier
Pour quelque chose que tu me dois non
Maintenant toi tu veux enfin m’entendre
On s’est arrêté tu veux reprendre

Refrain :

Menedo x7

playing cool makes me lose my mind 
i can’t be someone i don’t recognize 
i’m not the type to have to say it twice 
or wait for you til the end of the night 

i’ve been falling fast and you don’t seem to move 
but is it worse for me
if i tell the truth? 
and are you just a poison that i shouldn’t use 
wish i could say to you 
what i can’t say to you 

we could take it slower
wait until we’re older
but i might be somebody 
you might not even know her 
i’m going through changes 
it’s a rollercoaster 
but i might be somebody 
you might not even know her
we could take it slower

who knows who i’ll be tomorrow 
but i hope that you still like her the same 
we might end up strangers somehow 
you should get to know me today

but is it worse for me
if i tell the truth? 
and are you just a poison that i shouldn’t use

snippet.title: Graham asks FBI director if the 'Proud Boys' are  a domestic terrorist group
snippet.description:
The Proud Boys gathered at the Washington Monument at 10 a.m. on Jan. 6 dressed “incognito” to avoid detection, and then fanned out across the Capitol to prevent law enforcement from identifying them en masse, prosecutors alleged Monday in a legal filing that provides the most detail yet about the group’s actions on the day of the insurrection.

Read more here: https://www.politico.com/news/2021/03/01/proud-boys-capitol-472012

ABOUT THE VOICE
The four-time Emmy Award-winning musical competition series “The Voice” returns with the strongest vocalists from across the country invited to compete in the show’s newest season. Pop music sensation Nick Jonas reclaims his red chair alongside superstar returning coaches Kelly Clarkson, John Legend, and Blake Shelton for Season 20. Carson Daly returns as host. The show’s innovative format features four stages of competition: the Blind Auditions, the Battle Rounds, Knockouts, and the Live Performance Shows. During the Blind Auditions, the decisions from the musician coaches are based solely on voice and not looks. If a coach is impressed by the artist’s voice, he/she pushes a button to select the artist for his/her team. The singers with the lowest number of votes will be sent home each week. In the end, one will be named “The Voice” and will receive the grand prize of a recording contract. Stream Now on the NBC App!

snippet.title: My cat's engine won't start!
snippet.description:
vroom... prrbbtt... vroom... 👅

edit: #20 on Trending?!? WHAT?!!

Thanks to Gez, one of our Patreon members, who suggested this title! 

As you may have seen in her "Prrbbtt" compilation video (https://youtu.be/RUJgP2w874c), Shorty usually does her little "hi" activation sound when I walk by and see her in her box, er, I mean, Her Royal Meowjesty's Secret Fortress. But here she does it in succession when I was playing peek-a-boo with her. Yes I play peek-a-boo with my cat so what. I thought it was funny, so I wanted this as part of the ShoKo Shorts playlist. Hope everyone's doing great out there!

Peace and purrs out,

Rob

As you may have seen in her "Prrbbtt" compilation video (https://youtu.be/RUJgP2w874c), Shorty usually does her little "hi" activation sound when I walk by and see her in her box, er, I mean, Her Royal Meowjesty's Secret Fortress. But here she does it in succession when I was playing peek-a-boo with her. Yes I play peek-a-boo with my cat so what. I thought it was funny, so I wanted this as part of the ShoKo Shorts playlist. Hope everyone's doing great out there!

Peace and purrs out,

Rob

snippet.title: We sold my bike for charity! Find out who got it and more
snippet.description:
Today we actually send the P7 off to its new home! After multiple eBay mishaps (and the last time we use it to sell a bike) this chapter is finally over.

Shoutout to Competitive Cyclist for sponsoring the original build. Shop somewhere with expert Gearheads that you can actually call on the phone! https://bit.ly/2EO2AYB

Check out Jared's Channel here: https://youtube.com/channel/UCYIHUs5CJnaxGidbYv-vuIQ

See the original video here https://youtu.be/39fCKTCOg8A

Berm Peak Jerseys https://cognativemtb.com/collections/seths-bike-hacks-collection/products/berm-peak-tech-jersey-teal

Want us to review your unique mountain bike or outdoor product? https://www.sethsbikehacks.com/product-review/

Check out our main channel https://youtube.com/c/sethsbikehacks
Follow me on Instagram https://instagram.com/sethsbikehacks
Berm Peak Merch https://cognativemtb.com/collections/seths-bike-hacks-collection

Music in this video is from 
http://share.epidemicsound.com/trQSg
and https://soundstripe.com?fpr=seth20
#mountainbiking

I'm also working on a long-term moonshot project: Building a free public bike park in the Asheville metro area. Join my Patreon and 100% of the proceeds go towards funding this. https://www.patreon.com/sethsbikehacks

Advertising disclosure: All of these videos contain products, logos, or mentions associated with Diamondback Bicycles. Whether or not the video itself was sponsored by Diamondback, they do support this channel, and by extension, every video on it.

snippet.title: March Expo 2021: New Possibilities. Go Further.
snippet.description:
March Expo 2021 at Alibaba.com is a month-long virtual event for business owners to discover new products and quality suppliers while taking advantage of exciting incentives and offers. 

Hear from industry leaders and experts to learn how you can take your business to the next level. Discover top trending products in popular categories, such as Consumer Electronics, Fashion, Beauty & Personal Care, Home & Garden, and more. Enjoy exclusive discounts during the opening live show of the March Expo. New possibilities are endless for your business! So, this March, let's go further together! 

Learn more: https://c.tb.cn/F3.ZD8K84

snippet.title: Crepes - You Suck at Cooking (episode 123)
snippet.description:
Crepes are a not just a thin edible pancake. They're not a cake at all. They're a crepe. 

Subscribe: http://bit.ly/1HuynlY
Book + Merch: http://yousuckatcooking.com
http://instagram.com/yousuckatcooking
https://twitter.com/yousuckatcookin

RECIPE

1 large egg
⅓ up flour 
¾ cup milk 

This will make around 4 decent sized crepes 
Make raw egg pudding with the egg and flour 
Add a bit of the milk and Wangjangler until smooth 
Repeat until you have no milk left 
Let the batter sit for an hour if you're a baby who loves following the rules
Put a small amount of butter in a pan on medium heat, then wipe it out with a paper towel, or an expensive silk scarf 
Pour some batter in and swirl it. For a medium large pan around ¼ to ⅓ cup of batter will be enough. For a 37 foot pan you'll need ten gallons of batter 
Cook until crispy crusticles start to form 
Lift
Blow
Grab 
Flip
But you can probably skip blowing and also don't use your fingers if you're worried about burning yourself. Just use a spatula or try to flip it in the pan...but honestly good luck lol you're not that good at flipping. 
Cook the other side just a bit and then you know, stuff it or roll stuff in it, or fold stuff in it, or make crepe origami. Your call

snippet.title: FIRST DRIVE: Audi RS e-tron GT, 637bhp EV review... feat. Marques Brownlee
snippet.description:
The new Audi RS e-tron GT is more than just a Porsche Taycan in a sharp suit. It shares its platform and tech with the Porsche, but Audi is pitching it as more of a cruiser than an outright sports car... just one that happens to have supercar-shaming performance. With up to 637bhp available, it's not just the first Audi RS model to be pure electric, it's also the most powerful to ever wear the RS badge. Top Gear Magazine editor Jack Rix, is among the first to drive one and deliver his verdict. As a bonus, we also speak to tech-reviewer Marques Brownlee about his thoughts on Audi's new offering, and EVs in general. Marques is one of YouTube's top tech-experts and, as we reveal in the film, soon to be a new regular contributor to Top Gear Magazine with monthly written reviews on new electrified cars. Find more from Marques here: https://www.youtube.com/user/marquesbrownlee

Subscribe to Top Gear for more videos: http://bit.ly/SubscribeToTopGear

WATCH MORE TOP GEAR:
Top Gear Series 29: http://bit.ly/TGS29​
Geneva Online Motor Show: http://bit.ly/TGGMS20​
First Look: http://bit.ly/TG-FirstLook

MORE ABOUT TOP GEAR:
Want to watch a bit of Top Gear on the internet? Welcome to the most comprehensive collection of official clips you'll find on YouTube. Whether you're searching for a caravan challenge, Ken Block in the Hoonicorn, cars versus fighter jets, Stig power laps or the latest Chris Harris Drives, you can find all the iconic films here.

Want to share your views with the team? Join our BBC Studios Voice: https://www.bbcstudiosvoice.com/register

This is a commercial channel from BBC Studios.

Service & Feedback https://www.bbcstudios.com/contact/contact-us/

snippet.title: Pawn Stars: SHIPWRECK TREASURE is Worth Its Weight in Gold! (Season 2) | History
snippet.description:
Watch all new episodes of Pawn Stars, returning Monday, March 22 at 9/8c, and stay up to date on all of your favorite The HISTORY Channel shows at https://history.com/schedule.

Rick calls in an expert to examine a gold bar that might be an extremely valuable treasure from an old shipwreck, in this clip from Season 2, "Gold Diggers." #PawnStars
Find out more about the show and watch full episodes on our site:
https://histv.co/PawnStars

Check out exclusive The HISTORY Channel content:
History Newsletter - https://histv.co/newsletter
Website - https://histv.co/History
Facebook - https://histv.co/Facebook
Twitter - https://histv.co/Twitter

"Pawn Stars" follows three generations of the Harrison family as they assess the value of items coming in and out of their Gold & Silver Pawn Shop in Las Vegas, from the commonplace to the truly historic.

HISTORY® is the leading destination for award-winning original series and specials that connect viewers with history in an informative, immersive, and entertaining manner across all platforms. snippet.title: Amy Poehler and Tina Fey's Opening Monologue - 2021 Golden Globes
snippet.description:
Watch Amy Poehler and Tina Fey's hilarious opening monologue as they host the 78th annual Golden Globe Awards.
» Subscribe for More: http://bit.ly/NBCSub
» Stream on Peacock: https://bit.ly/StreamPeacock

NBC ON SOCIAL:
YouTube: http://www.youtube.com/nbc
Twitter: http://Twitter.com/NBC
Facebook: http://Facebook.com/NBC
Instagram: http://instagram.com/nbc

Find NBC trailers, full episode highlights, previews, promos, clips, and digital exclusives here.

ABOUT THE 2021 GOLDEN GLOBE AWARDS:
The 78th Golden Globes will take place on February 28, coast to coast from 4 pm to 8 pm PT/7-11 ET on NBC. The event will be hosted by Tina Fey and Amy Poehler, returning for the fourth time, after hosting in 2013, 2014, and 2015. Fey and Poehler will share duties from their respective cities, with Fey on the East Coast and Poehler on the West Coast. Fey will be live from New York’s Rainbow Room, Poehler will be live from the Beverly Hilton, in Beverly Hills, and nominees, from various locations around the world.

Amy Poehler and Tina Fey's Opening Monologue - 2021 Golden Globes
https://youtu.be/cOzOXMfG3GQ

NBC on YouTube
http://www.youtube.com/user/nbc

snippet.title: [LIVE] ATEEZ 에이티즈 '불놀이야' (I'm The One) Showcase Stage 쇼케이스 무대 (홍중, 성화, 윤호, 여상, 산, 민기, 우영, 종호) [통통컬처]
snippet.description:
#ATEEZ #에이티즈​ #불놀이야

3월 1일 에이티즈가 여섯 번째 미니앨범 'ZERO : FEVER Part.2'을 발매했다. 이번 앨범에는 타이틀곡 '불놀이야'(I'm The One)​와 수록곡 '선도부(The Leaders)', 'Time Of Love', 'Take Me Home', 'Celebrate' 등 총 7곡이 수록됐다.

On March 1, ATEEZ released their sixth mini-album, "ZERO: FEVER Part.2". The album contains a total of seven songs, including the title track ‘I'm The One’, the side tracks ‘The Leaders’, ‘Time Of Love’, ‘Take Me Home’ and ‘Celebrate’.

✔️TongTong Culture is a Korean pop culture channel of Yonhap News Agency. 연합뉴스가 만드는 대중문화 전문채널 '통통컬처' (보도자료/출연문의 : syipd@yna.co.kr)

snippet.title: Piers Erupts at Prince Harry & Meghan's Oprah Winfrey Interview | Good Morning Britain
snippet.description:
The Duke of Sussex revealed he feared “history repeating itself” in a reference to his mother’s death as he recounted his royal life with wife Meghan. Harry was heard making the comparison in a preview clip of the couple’s much anticipated interview with Oprah Winfrey. US television network CBS released two 30-second excerpts from Oprah With Meghan And Harry: A CBS Primetime Special - which is set to air at 8pm Eastern Time in the US on Sunday, or 1.00am Monday UK time.

Subscribe now for more! http://bit.ly/1NbomQa

Broadcast on 01/03/2021

#TheVoice #TheVoiceBlindAuditions #TheVoice2021 #KenzieWheeler #KeithWhitley #DontCloseYourEyes #NBC #Music #Highlight #BlakeShelton #JohnLegend #KellyClarkson #NickJonas

NBC’s The Voice follows the strongest vocalists from across the country and invites them to compete in this season's blockbuster vocal competition.

Find The Voice trailers, full episode highlights, previews, promos, clips, and digital exclusives here.

NBC ON SOCIAL:
YouTube: http://www.youtube.com/nbc
Twitter: http://Twitter.com/NBC
Facebook: http://Facebook.com/NBC
Instagram: http://instagram.com/nbc

ABOUT THE VOICE
The four-time Emmy Award-winning musical competition series “The Voice” returns with the strongest vocalists from across the country invited to compete in the show’s newest season. Pop music sensation Nick Jonas reclaims his red chair alongside superstar returning coaches Kelly Clarkson, John Legend, and Blake Shelton for Season 20. Carson Daly returns as host. The show’s innovative format features four stages of competition: the Blind Auditions, the Battle Rounds, Knockouts, and the Live Performance Shows. During the Blind Auditions, the decisions from the musician coaches are based solely on voice and not looks. If a coach is impressed by the artist’s voice, he/she pushes a button to select the artist for his/her team. The singers with the lowest number of votes will be sent home each week. In the end, one will be named “The Voice” and will receive the grand prize of a recording contract. Stream Now on the NBC App!

snippet.description:
Hello my loves!
So in this video I will answer some of your questions regarding the subject of being alone and traveling alone, since that was one of the most common questions on my previous video.
I also let you follow along during this weekend that I spent in my art studio with my beautiful dog Nanook, and some skiing out in the winter forest, and much more of course!

I hope you will enjoy it! And THANK YOU so much for watching! ♥

snippet.title: TRAVELING ACROSS IRAQ FOR 7 DAYS (Kurdistan)
snippet.description:
🙏🏼 Thank you for making these videos possible through your support of Seek Discomfort 
⚡️ SEEK DISCOMFORT: http://seek-discomfort.com/yes-theory

This week, I traveled to the beautiful country of Iraq.  All my life I'd heard of the war in Iraq and how dangerous it was to visit, but I wanted to go there and explore if for myself to hear the stories that didn't make it into the media.  So, along with Drew Binsky, Lexie Alford and Cory Martin, we were taken around Iraqi Kurdistan by our amazing guide, Baderkhan.

Thank you to Lexie Limitless for joining us on this crazy adventure:

https://www.instagram.com/lexielimitless/

Thank you to Drew Binsky for joining us:

snippet.title: Ocho Breaks Down: Real Men Cry Too | I AM ATHLETE with Brandon Marshall, Chad Johnson & More
snippet.description:
WATCH MORE → https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLGAaZmvZaF9gtsK1erpReLEv_kiofqr4w

When is the last time you have asked the people you care about how they are doing? Brandon, Chad, Fred and Channing open up the discussion talking about the sudden loss of friend and former NFL player Vincent Jackson and how he was found days after passing away. "Did anyone check on him?" Brandon poses the question which leads him into doing a mental check-in with all the guys. 

In a special moment of vulnerability and raw emotion, the guys are brought to tears as they sit and talk about deep life discussions. The guys talk about how there's a stigma in society that men and young boys are always raised to be tough and not show emotion or the world will look at you differently. With athletes, that notion is instilled by coaches and teammates saying tears are a sign of weakness when in fact it shouldn't be viewed that way. Being strong is part of dealing with emotions and being able to share with others what's truly going on inside your mind and heart. 

After recently losing his mother Hurricane Paula Johnson, Chad opens up about their relationship and how he's struggled with the emotions tied to loss. Recounting the memories and leading up to her final days, Chad is very transparent that the relationship was unique in many factors but he wouldn't have had it any other way. “It hurts to lose the person responsible for who I am,” Chad says, as he breaks down which brings Brandon and Channing to tears too. Fred follows it up saying that sometimes things in life are bigger than sports and different from what people portray on the outside, we all go through things and it's ok to let that emotion out. 

After a group hug of comfort and reassurance, Chef Nancie comes out and opens up about tragically losing her brother years ago and how the pain never fades but the good memories help make it easier to cope. 

I Am Athlete Movie Posters Available now on houseofathlete.com! 

Special Thanks to Botaniko Weston for providing us a location to film the episode. 

FOLLOW US ON:
Instagram | https://instagram.com/iamathletepodcast
Twitter | https://twitter.com/IAMATHLETEpod
Website | https://houseofathlete.com

#IAMATHLETE
#BrandonMarshall
#ChadJohnson
tags: Cam Newton: I Can't Go Out Like That | I AM ATHLETE with Brandon Marshall

snippet.title: door tier list
snippet.description:
The first 1000 people to use the link will get a free trial of Skillshare Premium Membership: https://skl.sh/icecreamsandwich01211



Here's the tier list:
https://tiermaker.com/create/door-854724

I'm an idiot and made the tier list to have an A+ instead of an S and didn't realize until I was almost done with the video but whatever the concept is the same. That website is kinda sketchy too for making a tier list. I wanted to make a tier list and it wanted me to sign up with a twitter account and requested ALL ACCESS to my twitter account. And there's no other website that lets you make tier lists so I just made a different twitter account so that I could make the tier list anyway. And it's only shady for making tier lists you can use tier lists for free without account access.



Also I am so tired cuz I needed to get this video done by literally today and I procrastinated a ton and stayed up really late to make sure it was finished. Idk why I do these things to myself. But it was a fun video so whatever! I always feel like I am worried about telling a story correctly and making sure it makes sense but for this I'm literally just ranking doors. No pressure at all. And that made it more enjoyable to make. I just need to get better about procrastination is all.

thanks for watching ❤️ hope you liked it.

(new merch is happening so I won't plug what I have now)
📱 twitter:
https://twitter.com/ICSandwichGuy
📷 instagram:
https://www.instagram.com/icecreamsandwichguy/

snippet.title: Camilo, Evaluna Montaner - Machu Picchu (Official Video)
snippet.description:
Camilo y Evaluna - Machu Picchu (Official Video)
Escucha “Mis Manos” ✋🏼🤚🏼: https://smarturl.it/MisManos
Dale me gusta 👍 y suscríbete 🔔: https://www.youtube.com/camilo?sub_confirmation=1

Escucha mis canciones en tu plataforma favorita
Spotify: https://link.tospotify.com/Camilo 
Apple Music: https://apple.co/Camilo
Amazon Music: http://amzn.to/Camilo
Pandora: https://pandora.app.link/Camilo

Letra:

Ay dime qué viste
Cuando me viste
Sé sincerx
 
Ay dime qué pasa
Cuando te paso
Por la cabezx
 
Yo sé que estoy locx
Pero tú más locx
De haberte fijado en mí
 
Yo sé que estoy locx
Pero tú locx
De haberte quedado aquí
 
Yo que debería estar 
Encerrada en una jaula
Cómo fue que terminé 
Al ladito tuyo en mi cama?
 
Mira qué cosa
Que ahora te tengo
Sin merecerte
 
Que no haya tenido 
Que disfrazarme
Para tenerte

Ay dime qué viste
Cuando me viste
Sé sincerx
 
Ay dime qué pasa
Cuando te paso
Por la cabezx
 
Yo sé que estoy locx
Pero tú más locx
De haberte fijado en mí
 
Yo sé que estoy locx
Pero tú locx
De haberte quedado aquí

Yo tengo más ruinas que Machu Picchu
He destruído mil planetas con cada cosa que he dicho
Y cómo fue que te fijaste en una cosa que era todo
Menos una obra de arte
 
Yo hago lo que quieras
Pa que tú me quieras
(tú solo pídelo)

Ay dime qué viste
Cuando me viste
Sé sincerx
 
Ay dime qué pasa
Cuando te paso
Por la cabezx
 
Yo sé que estoy locx
Pero tú más locx
De haberte fijado en mí
 
Yo sé que estoy locx
Pero tú locx
De haberte quedado aquí

Cuando mis ojos te vieron 
Casi me caigo
Casi me, casi me muero
Cuando mis ojos te vieron
No solo te vieron
Sino que al amor conocieron

Ay dime qué viste
Cuando me viste
Sé sincerx
 
Ay dime qué pasa
Cuando te paso
Por la cabezx
 
Yo sé que estoy locx
Pero tú más locx
De haberte fijado en mí
 
Yo sé que estoy locx
Pero tú locx
De haberte quedado aquí

Yo hago lo que quieras
Pa que tú me quieras
(Camilo y Evaluna) 

Sígueme en redes 
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@camilo
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/camilo
Twitter: https://twitter.com/camilomusica
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/camilomusica

Sigue a Evaluna en redes
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@evaluna
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/evaluna
Twitter: https://twitter.com/montanerevaluna
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/evalunamontanerofficial 

Directores: Evaluna Montaner / Santiago Achaga
Productor: Nicolás Herreño Leal
Director de fotografía: Nicolás Vallejo
Casa Productora: MadLove

Más de mis videos: 
Ropa Cara - https://youtu.be/YrtMpe0WOpc
BEBÉ con El Alfa - https://youtu.be/WwvTquVQKfA
Vida de Rico - https://youtu.be/qKp1f7Vn9dM

Pero tú más locx
De haberte fijado en mí
 
Yo sé que estoy locx
Pero tú locx
De haberte quedado aquí

Cuando mis ojos te vieron 
Casi me caigo
Casi me, casi me muero
Cuando mis ojos te vieron
No solo te vieron
Sino que al amor conocieron

Ay dime qué viste
Cuando me viste
Sé sincerx
 
Ay dime qué pasa
Cuando te paso
Por la cabezx
 
Yo sé que estoy locx
Pero tú más locx
De haberte fijado en mí
 
Yo sé que estoy locx
Pero tú locx
De haberte quedado aquí

Yo hago lo que quieras
Pa que tú me quieras
(Camilo y Evaluna)

snippet.title: Is the NEW 2022 Nissan 400Z a sports car worth the price?
snippet.description:
The ALL NEW 400Z is highly anticipated by enthusiasts around the world and we are all hoping Nissan will deliver. The exterior of the new Z features plenty of styling clues taken for the 240Z, 280Z, and 300ZX. On the outside you will find 19in wheels, and massive rotors and calipers. On the inside you will be greeted by the tri-gauge pod on top of the dash, and all new infotainment system and 12.3in digital gauge cluster. Under the hood enthusiasts are hoping for a 3.0L twin-turbo V6, but the great news is there is still the availability of the manual transmission. Is the NEW 2022 Nissan 400Z going to be worth the price?

snippet.title: Je fais un casse-tête à 15 000€ !
snippet.description:
(Catégorie : Mental Game)

Nous y sommes ! J'ai demandé à Labsterium de me réaliser un casse-tête sur mesure, unique, en leur laissant 4 mois et un budget de 15 000€ ! Je n'ai rien su, c'est Fanny et Jeremy qui ont tout suivi en secret. Voici enfin le résultat ! Contrairement à la rumeur ça n'est pas le dernier casse-tête de la chaîne, il y en aura d'autres. Mais il reste une question : Est-ce que l'on refait fabriquer un autre sur mesure ? Avec un budget fou ? Dites moi dans les commentaires ! 

F.A.Q : 
- Vous pourrez voir les coulisses de ce casse-tête (dont sa construction) dans les vidéos et vlogs de ma deuxième chaîne : https://youtube.com/c/FabienOlicardLadeuxi%C3%A8mecha%C3%AEne
- Le casse-tête n'est pas à gagner pour le moment, mais j'ai un super projet pour lui pour la suite, je vous tiens au courant sur mon Instagram et ma chaine secondaire dans les semaines à venir.
- Merci d'avoir supporté les placements de produits des précédentes vidéos qui ont permis de financer ce casse tête ! 
-----
La boutique Brainstor-M : https://www.brainstor-m.com
Les dates du spectacle : https://bit.ly/2Oq0LR6
Le magazine CURIOUZ : https://www.curiouz.fr 
Mes livres : https://brainstor-m.com/collections/en-ligne
-----
Mon Instagram : https://bit.ly/2OrJKWx
Ma chaine Twitch : https://www.twitch.tv/fabienolicard
Ma Deuxième chaîne YouTube : https://youtube.com/c/FabienOlicardLadeuxi%C3%A8mecha%C3%AEne
TikTok : @fabienolicard
Mon site internet (qui contient en général la réponse à vos questions) : http://www.fabienolicard.fr 
-----
Pas de chapitrage de la vidéo, exceptionnellement, pour ne pas vous spoiler... 
*********************************************************************************

Merci à la Team Sherlock's (Loïc et Denis au tournage/montage, Fanny chargée de prod, Jeremy assistant de prod).

Merci à Jérémy .m et la dream team (Clem's, Prodeod, An Na, Donovan Draconile, Ticha, Candyce, Delsphynx, Aurélie, Howly, Eline.m, Mickael, Amandine Duhammel et Evalia) qui m’aident à modérer l’espace commentaire tout en mangeant des cookies !

Contact (pro uniquement) fabien.olicard@sherlockm.com 

*********************************************************************************

snippet.title: Clash Royale: 5th ANNIVERSARY (New Season! Free Emotes!)
snippet.description:
#ClashRoyale #Birthday #Anniversary
It's Clash Royale's 5th Anniversary! Thank you to all of our players for the journey so far!

Let's get this party started!
Unlock 2 Free Emotes
Crazy Elixir Challenges
New Boosted Card Every Week

See you in the Birthday Arena!

Subscribe for more! ►► http://supr.cl/SubRoyale

Enter the Arena! From the creators of Clash of Clans comes a real-time multiplayer game starring the Royales, your favorite Clash characters and much, much more.

Collect and upgrade dozens of cards featuring the Clash of Clans troops, spells and defenses you know and love, as well as the Royales: Princes, Knights, Baby Dragons and more. Knock the enemy King and Princesses from their towers to defeat your opponents and win Trophies, Crowns and glory in the Arena. Form a Clan to share cards and build your very own battle community.

Lead the Clash Royale Family to victory!

FEATURES
• Duel players from around the world in real-time in both 1v1 and 2v2 Battles
• Earn chests to unlock rewards, collect powerful new cards and upgrade existing ones
• Destroy opponent's towers and win Crowns to earn epic Crown chests
• Build and upgrade your card collection with the Clash Royale Family along with dozens of your favorite Clash troops, spells and defenses
• Construct your ultimate Battle Deck to defeat your opponents
• Progress through multiple Arenas all the way to the top
• Form a Clan to share cards and build your very own battle community
• Challenge your Clanmates and friends to a private duel, or play side-by-side in a 2v2 Battle
• Work together with your Clan to unlock Clan Chests
• Play new events every week
• Learn different battle tactics by watching the best duels on TV Royale

PLEASE NOTE! Clash Royale is free to download and play, however, some game items can also be purchased for real money. If you don't want to use this feature, please disable in-app purchases in your device's settings. Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash Royale. A network connection is also required.

Support:
Are you having problems? Visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/clash-royale/ or contact us in-game by going to Settings, Help and support.

Privacy Policy:
http://supercell.com/en/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://supercell.com/en/terms-of-service/

Parent's Guide:
http://supercell.com/en/parents/

#ClashRoyale

snippet.title: Can We Beat Minecraft Hardcore in 1.17? (New Cave Update)
snippet.description:
Can we beat hardcore minecraft 1.17? Duo hardcore minecraft!
Can we beat hardcore minecraft in the new cave update?

Me and my friend @GamerZ attempt to beat minecraft hardcore in the latest version of minecraft, minecraft 1.17 which is the new caves and cliffs update. Hardcore minecraft is the hardest difficulty of minecraft, it will be made even harder by having to explore giant caves, and fight through hoards of enemy mobs! This is a Duo version of beating hardcore minecraft in 1.17. This is duo minecraft 1.17 survival played on the latest minecraft 1.17 snapshot.

Will we be able to beat hardcore minecraft in 1.17? Watch till the end to find out!

snippet.title: Il s'est fait tatouer nos 2 visages sur la cuisse, nous allons donc le surprendre en Belgique.
snippet.description:
Avoir nos 2 énormes tronches gravées à vie sur sa cuisse, telle est la vie que Ben a décidé de mener.
Il était bien normal que nous trouvions un moyen de le régaler.

C'est fou d'avoir fait ça, ça nous touche tellement. C'est... bordel c'est fou.

Merci encore à Céline qui nous a grandement aidé dans cette surprise ! T'es la best ! 

Suivez les sur Insta : https://www.instagram.com/cherryb.tattoo/
https://instagram.com/benowltattoo?igshid=yed1wymfhxtu

On est testés avant chaque tournage. On doit en être, sans exagérer, à 751994 tests.

Merci à Sixt Bruxelles d'être si cools à chaque fois ahah !

DISCLAIMER : faites attention, un tatouage c’est pour la vie, ne prenez pas ça à la légère, quelque soit l’affection que vous nous portez.

Monteurs : Florian Hautekiet - Jérôme Fillette 
Vignette : Antoine Behaeghel - Moodmaker 

Directrice de production : Camille Selosse 
Chargées de production : Élise Porcher - Blanche Martin 
Assistants de production : Marie Barthelemy - Arthur Miller
Stagiaire de production : Serena San Vincente

Rien à voir mais vous avez écoutez le podcast "Mugshots" sur Spotify ? C'est terriblement intéressant, surtout celui de Justin Bieber. Voilà. Bisous.

Rien à voir mais l'accrobranche de Coudou Parc à Six fours les plages est excellent. Voilà. Bisous.

Rien à voir mais honnêtement des bonnes fajitas au poulet, avec le guacamole bien tendre, la crème fraîche, le poulet savoureux et quelques épices, c'est vraiment incroyable. Voilà. Bisous.

Rien à voir mais la chaîne Youtube "Vilebrequin" est assez géniale. Voilà. Bisous.

Rien à voir mais n'oubliez jamais que le rpg CHRONO TRIGGER est l'alliance entre la team de Final Fantasy ET de Dragon Ball. D'où ce jeu sublime. Voilà. Bisous.

NBC’s The Voice follows the strongest vocalists from across the country and invites them to compete in this season's blockbuster vocal competition.

Find The Voice trailers, full episode highlights, previews, promos, clips, and digital exclusives here.

NBC ON SOCIAL:
YouTube: http://www.youtube.com/nbc
Twitter: http://Twitter.com/NBC
Facebook: http://Facebook.com/NBC
Instagram: http://instagram.com/nbc

ABOUT THE VOICE
The four-time Emmy Award-winning musical competition series “The Voice” returns with the strongest vocalists from across the country invited to compete in the show’s newest season. Pop music sensation Nick Jonas reclaims his red chair alongside superstar returning coaches Kelly Clarkson, John Legend, and Blake Shelton for Season 20. Carson Daly returns as host. The show’s innovative format features four stages of competition: the Blind Auditions, the Battle Rounds, Knockouts, and the Live Performance Shows. During the Blind Auditions, the decisions from the musician coaches are based solely on voice and not looks. If a coach is impressed by the artist’s voice, he/she pushes a button to select the artist for his/her team. The singers with the lowest number of votes will be sent home each week. In the end, one will be named “The Voice” and will receive the grand prize of a recording contract. Stream Now on the NBC App!

Cam Anthony's Smooth Performance of Sam Smith's "Lay Me Down" - The Voice Blind Auditions 2021
https://youtu.be/KsIeUCVO1vE

The Voice
http://www.youtube.com/user/nbcthevoice
